overview.description: Endurance-focused road bike with stable handling and comfortable geometry for long rides.

build.frame: Topstone Carbon, Kingpin suspension system, SmartSense compatible, Proportional Response construction, 12x142mm thru-axle, 27.2 dropper post ready, BSA 68mm threaded BB, DirectLine internal cable routing, removable fender bridge, multiple gear/bottle mounts
build.fork: Lefty Oliver, 30mm travel, lockout, Chamber Damper w/ All-Over tune, ISO High-Ride air spring, tapered steerer, 700c, 55mm offset
build.handlebar: Cannondale 2 ShortDrop, 7050 alloy, 12 deg flare drop
build.saddle: Fizik Terra Argo X5, S-alloy rails
build.seatPost: Cannondale DownLow Dropper Post, 27.2, 60/80/100mm travel, shifter-integrated lever

groupSet.brakes: Shimano GRX 820 hydraulic disc, 160/160mm MT800/RT76 rotors

wheels.rims: DT Swiss G 540, 700c, 28h, 24mm inner width, tubeless ready
